description:
Apologies for the last "problem". I completely forgot about SL (must have been out of my mind at the time). Anyway, thanks to all who tried to help out.

Here's a "real" problem (if I messed up something, please comment (Thanks to Tails, Kaf, and Smartaleck for the corrections)). It comes from one of my games, when my 3d opponent completely destroyed me here (and somewhere else too, but that's another story).
